message:
readme: add top-of-file WebP illustration and switch from source PNG asset

Adds a centered hero illustration at the top of the project README using the same presentation style used in /dp/xf/README.md.

Detailed changes:
- Convert frankenfs_illustration.png to frankenfs_illustration.webp targeted around 350 KB (actual output ~355,048 bytes) for better documentation asset efficiency.
- Insert a centered image block at the very top of README.md pointing to frankenfs_illustration.webp with descriptive alt text.
- The original PNG source file was intentionally removed after conversion per request and is not committed.

Rationale: this commit keeps documentation media optimized while improving README visual onboarding without modifying runtime code.
